96.reason: [Using ==1 for strcmp is incorrect; strcmp returns >0 when p->word > q->word, not necessarily 1. This causes incomplete sorting.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using ==1 for strcmp is incorrect; strcmp returns >0 when p->word > q->word, not necessarily 1. This causes incomplete sorting.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  // Error: strcmp returns >0 for greater, not necessarily 1. Should use >0 instead of ==1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition should be > 0, not == 1. strcmp returns positive if first > second, but not necessarily 1. This causes incorrect sorting.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Using ==1 for strcmp is incorrect; strcmp returns >0 when first string is lexicographically greater, not necessarily 1. This causes incomplete sorting.]
